name: Guangdong Sunwill Precising Plastic Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangdong Sunwill Precising Plastic Co.,Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells air conditioner fans and engineering plastics primarily in China. Its products include cross flow fans, axial fans, centrifugal fans, plastic housings, PVC tubes, plastic molds, and various kinds of modified engineering plastics. The company also offers plastic products comprising auto parts, pipe parts, electric appliances, mold displays, and other products; micro irrigation equipment, such as filters, micro and spray nozzles, drip stoppers, and emitters; and plastic injection and assembly, and after-sale services. In addition, it provides cross-flow, axial-flow, and centrifugal fan blades, as well as fan housings for household, business, and vehicle air conditioners and plastic car parts; and electric machines and materials, sanitary products, pipeline parts, metal products, electric products, and packaging materials. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Foshan, China.
